title: sorghum piptatherum
intro: Sorghum piptatherum, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of grass native to Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of sorghum piptatherum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of sorghum piptatherum can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
